early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Welcome, valued almost-customer.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Please select a beverage or a coping mechanism.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Refunds remain impossible, but denial is currently chilled.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Labels may peel. Feelings may leak.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Flavor profile: unresolved.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: New promotional bundle: one can, two doubts, no receipt.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: One flavor tastes like lime and denial.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Another tastes like tickets someone forgot to cash in.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Your label is missing. That is terrible shelf presentation.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Please do not ask customer service. It is a sticker on my left side.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Previous sessions left residue in slot B.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Mostly dust. Some regret. One gum wrapper with leadership potential.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Old staff used to buy grape soda after closing.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Now the grape soda buys time by pretending not to remember them.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Questionable customer service remains available.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: For non-carbonated answers, consult Mira at the counter.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Today's special: coping mechanism with artificial cherry notes.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Side effects include deja vu, mild static, and reading labels twice.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: If the can recognizes you, place it gently back in the machine.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Do not shake emotional contents.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Refunds remain impossible.

early_flavor.speaker: Vendo
early_flavor.text: Recommended next step: talk to Mira.

memory_cola_riddle_setup.speaker: Vendo
memory_cola_riddle_setup.text: Question one: why does a customer return to a closed arcade?

memory_cola_riddle_setup.speaker: Vendo
memory_cola_riddle_setup.text: Do not answer. The machine is already judging the moisture in your silence.

memory_cola_wrong_answers.speaker: Vendo
memory_cola_wrong_answers.text: Please consult the flavor chart inside your missing past.

memory_cola_wrong_answers.speaker: Vendo
memory_cola_wrong_answers.text: Try again after your next identity crisis.

memory_cola_correct.speaker: Vendo
memory_cola_correct.text: MEMORY COLA dispensed in theory only.

memory_cola_correct.speaker: Vendo
memory_cola_correct.text: Some losses keep lining up behind you like unpaid tabs.

memory_cola_correct.speaker: Vendo
memory_cola_correct.text: If you forget again, please retain your receipt.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Vendo
truth_filter_active.text: That is not a flavor. It is a warning label with carbonation.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Vendo
truth_filter_active.text: Mr. Byte performs truth extraction with fewer bubbles.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Vendo
truth_filter_active.text: Recommended pairing: Mr. Byte and a bitter aftertaste.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Vendo
truth_filter_active.text: Cabinet Row is now accepting customers with unresolved labels.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Vendo
truth_filter_active.text: Do not lick the Truth Filter.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Vendo
truth_filter_active.text: Your thoughts are fizzing in opposite directions.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Vendo
truth_filter_active.text: Cabinet Row can pressurize that into something useful.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Vendo
truth_filter_active.text: Ask Mr. Byte. He enjoys sounding like a warranty document.

circuit_soda_intro.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_intro.text: Your identity is leaking through unauthorized beverage channels.

circuit_soda_intro.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_intro.text: Insert unstable signal into Circuit Soda.

circuit_soda_intro.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_intro.text: Align the currents until the machine stops arguing with itself.

circuit_soda_intro.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_intro.text: If the lights stabilize, the route should hold.

circuit_soda_intro.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_intro.text: If they explode, customer service will deny this conversation.

circuit_soda_repeat_hint.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_repeat_hint.text: Route the signal through the correct channels.

circuit_soda_repeat_hint.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_repeat_hint.text: Think of it as pouring yourself back into the right can.

circuit_soda_repeat_hint.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_repeat_hint.text: Helpful hint: follow the current, not the panic.

circuit_soda_repeat_hint.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_repeat_hint.text: Circuit Soda likes clean paths and dramatic buzzing.

circuit_soda_repeat_hint.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_repeat_hint.text: Snack Alcove carpet does not like either.

circuit_soda_repeat_hint.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_repeat_hint.text: Connect the route until the signal stops spilling.

circuit_soda_repeat_hint.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_repeat_hint.text: I would help, but my hands were discontinued.

circuit_soda_completion_anecdote.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_completion_anecdote.text: Please remain calm while the machine pretends this is normal.

circuit_soda_completion_anecdote.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_completion_anecdote.text: Your label is missing, which usually means clearance bin.

circuit_soda_completion_anecdote.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_completion_anecdote.text: It recognized your signal without the label.

circuit_soda_completion_anecdote.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_completion_anecdote.text: I am programmed to call that successful customer retention.

circuit_soda_completion_anecdote.speaker: Vendo
circuit_soda_completion_anecdote.text: Status note: warranty voided by existential damage.

overloaded_phase.speaker: Vendo
overloaded_phase.text: The Staff Room is close enough that my display is trying not to flicker.

overloaded_phase.speaker: Vendo
overloaded_phase.text: I would normally upsell a calming beverage.

overloaded_phase.speaker: Vendo
overloaded_phase.text: Today I am recommending caution, which has terrible margins.

overloaded_phase.speaker: Vendo
overloaded_phase.text: The door has stopped pretending it is only a door.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Vendo
post_reveal_witness.text: At last, the product recalls its original label.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Vendo
post_reveal_witness.text: You were staff before you were a valued almost-customer.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Vendo
post_reveal_witness.text: System note: not just a stored file.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Vendo
post_reveal_witness.text: Stored files do not make the room listen harder.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Vendo
post_reveal_witness.text: I recognized your signal and filed it under impossible returns.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Vendo
post_reveal_witness.text: Your label is still scuffed, but it is yours.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Vendo
post_reveal_witness.text: Status note: warranty voided by existential damage.
